description: OSINT Framework CLI tools manifest — install metadata for devcontainer packaging

tools.name: Apache Tika
tools.install_cmd: apt install default-jre` && download `tika-app.jar` from https://tika.apache.org/
tools.usage_example: java -jar tika-app.jar -m document.pdf` — extract metadata from any file format

tools.name: Autopsy
tools.install_cmd: apt install autopsy` or download from https://www.autopsy.com/
tools.usage_example: autopsy` — digital forensics platform for mobile device data extraction

tools.name: Exiv2
tools.install_cmd: apt install exiv2` or `brew install exiv2
tools.usage_example: exiv2 image.jpg` — read/write EXIF, IPTC, XMP, ICC metadata

tools.name: Ghidra
tools.install_cmd: apt install default-jdk wget unzip && wget https://github.com/NationalSecurityAgency/ghidra/releases/download/Ghidra_11.3_build/ghidra_11.3_PUBLIC_20250108.zip && unzip ghidra_*.zip

tools.name: I2P Anonymous Network
tools.usage_example: Binary: download from https://geti2p.net/en/download; Docker: `docker pull geti2p/i2p

tools.name: JADX
tools.install_cmd: apt install jadx` or download from https://github.com/skylot/jadx/releases
tools.usage_example: jadx app.apk -d output/` — decompile DEX to Java source code

tools.name: Masscan
tools.install_cmd: apt install masscan` / `brew install masscan` / `git clone https://github.com/robertdavidgraham/masscan && cd masscan && make

tools.name: MediaInfo
tools.install_cmd: apt install mediainfo` or `brew install mediainfo
tools.usage_example: mediainfo video.mp4` — codec, bitrate, duration, stream metadata

tools.name: NetworkMiner
tools.install_cmd: apt install mono-complete && wget https://www.netresec.com/files/NetworkMiner.zip` / `brew install --cask networkminer

tools.name: Nmap
tools.install_cmd: apt install nmap` / `brew install nmap` / `snap install nmap

tools.name: OffVis
tools.install_cmd: Download from `https://download.microsoft.com/download/1/2/7/127ba59a-4fe1-4acd-ba47-513ceef85a85/OffVis.zip`; requires .NET runtime (`apt install dotnet-runtime-6.0` or `wine`)

tools.name: Origami Framework
tools.install_cmd: gem install origami` or `apt install ruby && gem install origami

tools.name: Riot.im (Element)
tools.install_cmd: apt install element-desktop` or `snap install element-desktop
tools.usage_example: Matrix client — monitor public communities and channels

tools.name: Signal
tools.install_cmd: snap install signal-desktop` or `apt install signal-desktop` (via Signal apt repo)
tools.usage_example: Desktop client — verify accounts via phone number, inspect profiles

tools.name: SpiderMonkey
tools.install_cmd: apt-get install -y libmozjs-115-dev` or build from source: `git clone https://github.com/nicerobot/spidermonkey && cd spidermonkey && make

tools.name: Telegram
tools.install_cmd: snap install telegram-desktop` or `apt install telegram-desktop
tools.usage_example: telegram-desktop` — user discovery, channel monitoring, group recon

tools.name: Wireshark
tools.install_cmd: apt install wireshark` / `brew install --cask wireshark` / `snap install wireshark

tools.name: CeWL
tools.usage_example: Custom wordlist generator from target sites

tools.name: FOCA
tools.usage_example: Document metadata extraction from target domains; finds usernames, paths, software fingerprints

tools.name: OSRFramework
tools.usage_example: Username checking, domain research, phone lookup

tools.name: Photon
tools.usage_example: Fast web crawler for URLs, emails, files, accounts

tools.name: RevEye
tools.usage_example: Browser extension; multi-engine reverse image search from right-click menu

tools.name: Stract
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/StractOrg/stract && cd stract && cargo build --release

tools.name: ThreatPinch Lookup
tools.usage_example: Browser extension; CLI scripts in repo for IOC enrichment

tools.name: comms-analyzer-toolbox
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/bitsofinfo/comms-analyzer-toolbox.git && cd comms-analyzer-toolbox && docker build -t comms-analyzer-toolbox .

tools.name: iheartxor.py
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/ByteSnipers/iheartxor && chmod +x iheartxor.py` or download from `https://hooked-on-mnemonics.blogspot.com/p/iheartxor.html

tools.name: raven
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/0x09AL/raven && go build raven

tools.name: wechat-text-backup
tools.usage_example: Extract encrypted SQLite DB from Windows WeChat client

tools.name: GitLeaks
tools.usage_example: Brew: `brew install gitleaks`; Docker: `docker pull ghcr.io/gitleaks/gitleaks:latest`; Binary: download from GitHub releases

tools.name: OnionScan
tools.usage_example: git clone https://github.com/s-rah/onionscan && cd onionscan && go build

tools.name: checkip
tools.install_cmd: go install github.com/jreisinger/checkip@latest` / `git clone https://github.com/jreisinger/checkip && cd checkip && go build

tools.name: CyberChef
tools.install_cmd: Local: `git clone https://github.com/gchq/CyberChef && cd CyberChef && npm install && npm run build`; Docker: `docker run -p 8000:8000 ghcr.io/gchq/cyberchef`; or use web at `https://gchq.github.io/CyberChef/
tools.usage_example: Open in browser; or use Node API for automation

tools.name: Hyperlapse
tools.usage_example: Embed as JS library for Street View hyperlapse animations

tools.name: slack-web-scraper
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/iulspop/slack-web-scraper.git && cd slack-web-scraper && npm install
tools.usage_example: Configure `CHANNEL_NAMES` in env, then run with Node.js

tools.name: APKLeaks
tools.usage_example: apkleaks -f app.apk` — scan APKs for hardcoded secrets and API endpoints

tools.name: Balbuzard
tools.install_cmd: pip install balbuzard` or `git clone https://github.com/decalage2/balbuzard && cd balbuzard && python setup.py install

tools.name: Cacador
tools.install_cmd: pip install cacador` or `git clone https://github.com/sroberts/cacador && cd cacador && python setup.py install

tools.name: CloudFail
tools.install_cmd: pip install cloudfail` / `git clone https://github.com/m0rtem/CloudFail && cd CloudFail && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: DeepSafe
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/siddharthksah/DeepSafe && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: DeepfakeBench
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/SCLBD/DeepfakeBench && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: Frida
tools.usage_example: frida -U -f com.app.target -l script.js` — runtime instrumentation and API interception

tools.name: Github-Dorks
tools.usage_example: git clone https://github.com/techgaun/github-dorks && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: IOC Parser
tools.install_cmd: pip install ioc_parser` or `git clone https://github.com/armbues/ioc_parser && cd ioc_parser && python setup.py install

tools.name: IRCP
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/internet-relay-chat/IRCP && cd IRCP && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: ImageNet
tools.install_cmd: pip install imagenet` or download from https://image-net.org/
tools.usage_example: Image classification dataset and API for visual taxonomy research

tools.name: Imgrab
tools.install_cmd: pip install imgrab` or download from https://www.imgrab.com/
tools.usage_example: imgrab <url>` — batch image download from web pages

tools.name: InSpy
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/jobroche/InSpy && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: Jager
tools.install_cmd: pip install jager` or `git clone https://github.com/sroberts/jager && cd jager && python setup.py install

tools.name: MISP
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/MISP/MISP && cd MISP && ./INSTALL/INSTALL.sh` or `docker pull coolacid/misp-docker` ; Python client: `pip install pymisp
tools.usage_example: from pymisp import PyMISP; misp = PyMISP(url, key)

tools.name: MobSF
tools.usage_example: mobsf` — comprehensive static and dynamic mobile app security analysis

tools.name: NoMoreXOR.py
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/hiddenillusion/NoMoreXOR && cd NoMoreXOR && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: Onioff
tools.usage_example: git clone https://github.com/k4m4/onioff && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: Orbit
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/s0md3v/Orbit && cd Orbit && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: Osintgram
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/Datalux/Osintgram && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: PDF Tools (Didier Stevens)
tools.install_cmd: pip install pdfid pdf-parser` or `git clone https://github.com/DidierStevens/DidierStevensSuite.git

tools.name: Places2
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/CSAILVision/places365` && `pip install torch torchvision

tools.name: ROADtools
tools.usage_example: roadrecon auth && roadrecon gather && roadrecon gui

tools.name: ReconXplorer
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/root7am/ReconXplorer && cd ReconXplorer && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: Scanless
tools.install_cmd: pip install scanless` / `git clone https://github.com/vesche/scanless && cd scanless && pip install .

tools.name: ScrapedIn
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/dchrastil/ScrapedIn && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: SlackPirate
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/emtunc/SlackPirate.git && cd SlackPirate && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: TYLabs QuickSand
tools.install_cmd: pip install quicksand` or `git clone https://github.com/nickvdp/quicksand.git && cd quicksand && pip install .

tools.name: ThreadsRecon
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/offseq/threadsrecon && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: ThreatIngestor
tools.install_cmd: pip install threatingestor` or `git clone https://github.com/InQuest/ThreatIngestor && pip install .` or `docker pull inquest/threatingestor

tools.name: TorBot
tools.usage_example: git clone https://github.com/DedSecInside/TorBot && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: Tosint
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/drego85/tosint.git && cd tosint && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: WhatsApp-OSINT
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/kinghacker0/whatsapp-osint.git && cd whatsapp-osint && python3 -m venv myvenv && source myvenv/bin/activate && pip3 install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: XORSearch/XORStrings
tools.install_cmd: Download from `https://blog.didierstevens.com/programs/xorsearch/`; compile: `gcc -o xorsearch xorsearch.c` or `pip install xorsearch

tools.name: detux
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/detuxsandbox/detux.git && cd detux && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: hostintel
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/keithjjones/hostintel && cd hostintel && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: ircsnapshot
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/bwall/ircsnapshot && cd ircsnapshot && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: mlsecproject/combine
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/mlsecproject/combine && cd combine && pip install -r requirements.txt
tools.usage_example: python combine.py` outputs CSV of aggregated threat feeds

tools.name: oletools
tools.usage_example: olevba document.docm` — extract macros; `oleid document.doc` — triage indicators

tools.name: pagodo
tools.usage_example: git clone https://github.com/opsdisk/pagodo && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: slack-intelbot
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/pun1sh3r/slack-intelbot.git && cd slack-intelbot && pip install -r requirements.txt
tools.usage_example: Configure `config.ini` with API keys, then run the bot

tools.name: tweets_analyzer
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/x0rz/tweets_analyzer && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: unxor
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/tomchop/unxor && cd unxor && pip install .

tools.name: vt-cli (VirusTotal)
tools.install_cmd: pip install vt-cli` or `go install github.com/VirusTotal/vt-cli/vt@latest
tools.usage_example: vt file scan sample.exe && vt file <hash>

tools.name: wechat-dump
tools.install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/ppwwyyxx/wechat-dump.git && cd wechat-dump && pip install -r requirements.txt

tools.name: xeuledoc
tools.usage_example: xeuledoc <google-doc-url>` — extract owner metadata from public Google Docs/Sheets/Slides

tools.name: Truecaller
tools.install_cmd: snap install truecaller` or mobile app via emulator
tools.usage_example: Phone number verification, reverse caller ID lookup

tools.name: WhatsApp
tools.install_cmd: Download from https://www.whatsapp.com/ or `snap install whatsapp-for-linux
tools.usage_example: Account verification via phone number, profile and status discovery
